description: At , I take ownership of the brand as it evolves in real time, shaping how it looks, feels, and communicates across every touchpoint. From product surfaces to marketing campaigns, I ensure a consistent and recognizable visual language that scales with the company. I collaborate closely with product and marketing teams, translating business goals into design decisions that not only improve engagement but also strengthen user trust and recall.

During my time at , I immersed myself in building a strong and consistent social presence. I created over 60 posts and reels, carefully aligning each piece with the brand’s tone and audience expectations. By contributing to content strategy and maintaining a steady publishing rhythm, I helped improve engagement and retention. My work focused on making content not just visually appealing, but meaningful enough to consistently capture attention in a crowded digital space.

At , I worked on branding a large-scale collegiate esports event, managing everything from strategy to execution. I designed promotional creatives, match-day visuals, and countdown campaigns that built anticipation and momentum. By structuring content into a narrative arc—from teasers to highlights—I helped sustain audience interest throughout the event, ultimately boosting reach and engagement in a measurable way.

With , I led the entire social media branding effort for a high-energy esports tournament. I crafted the visual identity and executed campaigns that brought the event to life online. Through a mix of teasers, match highlights, and countdown content, I built excitement and sustained interaction. The experience was about more than just design—it was about creating a digital atmosphere that matched the intensity of the competition.

designation: Brand Redesign & Social Media Content Manager
description: Working with , I reimagined the visual identity of the publication from the ground up. I redesigned layouts, typography, and editorial systems to create a more cohesive and modern aesthetic. Beyond print, I extended this identity into social media, producing engaging content that told stories rather than just sharing updates. Over time, this structured and narrative-driven approach significantly improved audience engagement and strengthened the publication’s digital presence.

At , I led a complete brand transformation at a crucial early stage. I developed a new logo, typography system, and color palette that aligned with the product’s vision and positioning. More importantly, I built a scalable design system that could be used across platforms—from websites to pitch decks—ensuring consistency while reducing repetitive design effort. This project was about giving a young startup a clear and confident visual voice.
